failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the user's key constraint "available" and planned/searches with available_only=false instead of restricting the search to available products.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner. The agent had enough information at the start to constrain the catalog search to available items. Instead, at index 1 it planned a query with "available_only": false and explicitly described this as searching "regardless of current availability." This violates the user's availability constraint. The later answer happened to select an available item, but the incorrect plan/tool constraint was not actually corrected in the tool call.
